findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:401:lemma subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq`, with RHS `QuotientGroup.mk (s := H) φ⁻¹ = QuotientGroup.mk (s := H) ψ⁻¹`; the new lemmas at lines 50, 72, 87, and 99 only transport that statement to `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientMk` under `[H.Normal]`.
findings.fix: Remove these declarations or replace them by uses of `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq` composed with `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal_mk` when a normalizer quotient spelling is needed.
findings.issue: The four normalizer-quotient equality criteria are special-case parallel APIs for the existing arbitrary-subgroup criterion in `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq`.

findings.evidence: Existing hits: `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:401:lemma subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq`, `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:71:lemma normalizerQuotientMk_eq_one_iff`, and Mathlib `GroupTheory/QuotientGroup/Defs.lean:120:theorem eq_one_iff`; the new lines 113, 134, 144, and 152 specialize these facts to the base class.
findings.fix: Derive these at use sites from `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq H e φ 1` and `QuotientGroup.eq_one_iff`/`Subgroup.normalizerQuotientMk_eq_one_iff`, or add a non-normal general lemma instead of normal-only duplicates.
findings.issue: The base-orbit membership criteria are just the `ψ = 1` specialization of the existing quotient-group criterion plus the standard quotient membership criterion, again only under the unnecessary normal-subgroup wrapper.

summary: The new file mostly adds normal-subgroup restatements of existing quotient-group fibre-orbit criteria, creating a parallel API rather than reusing the existing one.
